# Workflow Improvement

## Summary

Briefly describe the workflow improvement.

## Affected Workflow

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Engineering request workflow
- [ ] Engineering package workflow
- [ ] Security review workflow
- [ ] Validation and rollback workflow
- [ ] IaC generation guardrails
- [ ] ADR workflow
- [ ] Project memory workflow
- [ ] GitHub validation workflow
- [ ] Other

## Affected Path

List affected files or directories.

```text
path/to/file
```

## Current Behavior

Describe how the workflow currently works.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the proposed change.

## Reason for Change

Explain why this improvement is needed.

## Risk Level

Select one:

- [ ] Low — improves clarity or usability
- [ ] Medium — changes workflow behavior
- [ ] High — affects security review, validation, rollback, or IaC generation
- [ ] Critical — affects human approval gates or safety model

## Safety Review

Does this change affect any of the following?

- [ ] Human approval
- [ ] Risk classification
- [ ] Security review
- [ ] Validation
- [ ] Rollback
- [ ] Secrets handling
- [ ] Infrastructure as Code generation
- [ ] Public exposure
- [ ] Identity or access control
- [ ] No safety impact

## Backward Compatibility

Will this change affect existing examples, templates, schemas, or memory records?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

Explain if needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Workflow change is documented
- [ ] Related templates are updated
- [ ] Related prompts are updated
- [ ] Related schemas are updated if applicable
- [ ] Project index is updated if applicable
- [ ] Repository validation passes
- [ ] Human approval gate remains intact

## Additional Context

Add diagrams, examples, or references.
